requirement_topic.en: TRA Bahrain Mandatory Radio Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 巴林TRA强制无线电型号认证
requirement_topic.zht: 巴林TRA強制無線電型號認證

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, IoT, and any device using radio spectrum) must obtain mandatory type approval from the Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Bahrain (TRA — هيئة تنظيم الاتصالات) before import or sale in Bahrain. The TRA Bahrain approval mark and approval number must appear on the device and its packaging label. Approval requires test reports from an accredited laboratory to ETSI or ITU/IEC standards accepted by TRA Bahrain. CE Declaration of Conformity, FCC ID, and SRRC certificates are not accepted as substitutes. The GCC Mutual Recognition Arrangement (GCC MRA) provides recognition among Gulf Cooperation Council member states only and does not extend to EU or US approvals. Bahrain, as a GCC member, shares GCC technical regulations issued by the GCC Standardization Organization (GSO), but each member state's national regulator (TRA Bahrain) administers its own approval process. CCC/CE/FCC not recognized alone — TRA Bahrain issues a separate certificate.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa、物联网及任何使用无线频谱的设备）须在进口或于巴林销售前取得巴林电信监管局（TRA — هيئة تنظيم الاتصالات）的强制型号认证。巴林TRA审批标志及审批号须显示于设备及包装标签上。认证需提交获TRA巴林认可的实验室依据ETSI或ITU/IEC标准出具的测试报告。CE符合性声明、FCC ID及SRRC证书不可作为替代。GCC相互承认协议（GCC MRA）仅在海湾合作委员会成员国内有效，不延伸至欧盟或美国的批准。巴林作为GCC成员国，遵循GCC标准化组织（GSO）发布的GCC技术法规，但每个成员国的国家监管机构（巴林TRA）负责管理本国的审批流程。CCC/CE/FCC不单独获得认可，巴林TRA颁发独立证书。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa、物聯網及任何使用無線頻譜的設備）須在進口或於巴林銷售前取得巴林電信監管局（TRA — هيئة تنظيم الاتصالات）的強制型號認證。巴林TRA審批標誌及審批號須顯示於設備及包裝標籤上。認證需提交獲TRA巴林認可的實驗室依據ETSI或ITU/IEC標準出具的測試報告。CE符合性聲明、FCC ID及SRRC證書不可作為替代。GCC相互承認協議（GCC MRA）僅在海灣合作委員會成員國內有效，不延伸至歐盟或美國的批准。巴林作為GCC成員國，遵循GCC標準化組織（GSO）發布的GCC技術法規，但每個成員國的國家監管機構（巴林TRA）負責管理本國的審批流程。CCC/CE/FCC不單獨獲得認可，巴林TRA頒發獨立證書。

standards_or_laws: Bahrain Legislative Decree No. 48 of 2002 on Telecommunications (and amendments)
TRA Bahrain Type Approval Procedures and Requirements
GSO Technical Regulation for Telecom Terminal Equipment (GCC member states)

summary.en: In China, radio type approval is administered by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China). Telecom terminal equipment (devices connecting to public telecom networks) additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety and EMC for in-scope products under the CCC catalogue.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电型号认证由工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）负责。连接公共电信网络的电信终端设备还须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）涵盖列入CCC目录的产品的电气安全和EMC。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電型號認證由工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）負責。連接公共電信網路的電信終端設備還須取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）涵蓋列入CCC目錄的產品的電氣安全和EMC。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration, Article 58)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Telecom Equipment Access

gap.en: TRA Bahrain type approval is a wholly independent process from SRRC, CCC, CE, or FCC. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC certification is recognised by TRA Bahrain. The GCC MRA covers recognition only among Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, and Oman — it does not extend to China, EU, or US approvals. A fresh TRA Bahrain application with accredited-lab test reports, TRA Bahrain approval mark, and approval number on label is required for every model sold or imported into Bahrain.
gap.zh: 巴林TRA型号认证与SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全独立。巴林TRA不承认SRRC批准或CCC认证。GCC相互承认协议仅覆盖沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋、科威特、卡塔尔、巴林和阿曼之间的相互承认，不延伸至中国、欧盟或美国的批准。每款在巴林销售或进口的产品均须重新进行巴林TRA申请，提交经认可实验室出具的测试报告，并在标签上标注巴林TRA审批标志和审批号。
gap.zht: 巴林TRA型號認證與SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全獨立。巴林TRA不承認SRRC批准或CCC認證。GCC相互承認協議僅涵蓋沙烏地阿拉伯、阿聯酋、科威特、卡達、巴林和阿曼之間的相互承認，不延伸至中國、歐盟或美國的批准。每款在巴林銷售或進口的產品均須重新進行巴林TRA申請，提交經認可實驗室出具的測試報告，並在標籤上標注巴林TRA審批標誌和審批號。

source.publisher: TRA — Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Bahrain (هيئة تنظيم الاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TRA Bahrain type approval and the TRA Bahrain approval mark are mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Bahrain. SRRC, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC ID are not accepted substitutes. The GCC MRA does not extend recognition to Chinese approvals.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林TRA型号认证和巴林TRA审批标志对所有在巴林进口或销售的无线及电信终端设备为强制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作为替代。GCC MRA不延伸承认中国批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林TRA型號認證和巴林TRA審批標誌對所有在巴林進口或銷售的無線及電信終端設備為強制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作為替代。GCC MRA不延伸承認中國批准。
